undertittel: From wall push-ups to the one-arm — step by step.
intro: The push-up is the foundational upper-body exercise — chest, shoulders, triceps and a steady core, with no equipment at all. This path takes you from the very easiest variation and builds strength step by step. Move on when a step feels clean and controlled — there's no rush.

boss.laasHint: Master the standard push-up on the path to challenge the panda.
boss.innbydelse: Three rounds of push-ups against the panda. Beat all three and become the push-up master.

nivaer.tekst: Match the panda with 8 easy push-ups. The knee variation counts just as much.
The panda picks up the pace — 12 push-ups with clean form.
Everything you have left: 15 controlled push-ups. Beat the panda!

vegg-pushup.blurb: Pressing while standing against a wall. Safe and easy on the joints — perfect for learning direction and tension in the body.

sjekk.sporsmal: What is the main point of pressing against a wall?
valg: It lowers the load so you can learn the technique safely
sjekk.forklaring: The more upright you stand, the easier the press becomes — perfect for learning the movement.

skra-pushup-sofa-benk.blurb: Hands on a sofa or bench. The higher the surface, the easier — lower the height as you get stronger.

sjekk.sporsmal: How do you make an incline push-up easier?
sjekk.forklaring: The higher the surface your hands rest on, the less weight you carry.

kne-pushup.blurb: On your knees instead of your toes. It halves the load but teaches you the right path down to the floor.

sjekk.sporsmal: What should hold a straight line in a knee push-up?
valg: From the knees to the head
From the heels to the head
sjekk.forklaring: Keep your body straight from knees to head — don't let your hips sag.

push-up.blurb: The standard: a straight body from head to heel, elbows slightly in, down until the chest almost touches the floor.

sjekk.sporsmal: Where should the elbows point in a push-up?
sjekk.forklaring: Keeping the elbows slightly in toward the body spares the shoulders and gives more power.

diamant-smal-push-up.blurb: Hands close together under the chest. It shifts more of the work to the triceps and inner chest.

sjekk.sporsmal: What does a diamond/close push-up train extra?
sjekk.forklaring: A close hand position shifts more of the work to the triceps.

dekline-push-up.blurb: Feet raised on an elevated surface. The angle puts more load on the upper chest and shoulders.

sjekk.sporsmal: What do raised feet do in a decline push-up?
valg: Puts more load on the upper chest and shoulders
sjekk.forklaring: The angle shifts the load toward the upper chest and shoulders.

ring-push-up.blurb: Push-ups on rings or straps. The unstable grip forces control through the entire shoulder girdle.

sjekk.sporsmal: Why is a push-up on rings harder?
valg: The unstable grip demands more control
sjekk.forklaring: The rings wobble, so your shoulders and core have to work hard to keep you steady.

archer-push-up.blurb: The weight shifts onto one arm while the other extends out to the side. A big step toward the one-arm.

sjekk.sporsmal: What happens to the arms in an archer push-up?
valg: One carries most of the load while the other extends out
sjekk.forklaring: The weight shifts onto one arm — a step on the way to the one-arm.

pseudo-planche-push-up.blurb: Hands by the hips and the body leaning forward. It builds the forward-leaning strength needed further on.

sjekk.sporsmal: Where are the hands in a pseudo-planche push-up?
valg: By the hips, body leaning forward
sjekk.forklaring: Hands by the hips and the body leaning forward build the forward-leaning strength.

ettarms-progresjon.blurb: The goal: one arm, full control. Built gradually with a wider foot stance and less support each session.

sjekk.sporsmal: How do you build the one-arm push-up safely?
valg: Gradually: a wider foot stance and less support
sjekk.forklaring: Build gradually with wider feet and less support each session.
